'''Dead Eye''' was a large area of still air and dense gases and fog on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] of [[Bespin/Legends|Bespin]]. It existed in Bespin's atmosphere at least since the planet’s discovery.

==Appearances==
*''[[Dark Nest II: The Unseen Queen]]'' {{1st}}
